subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-05-07 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The people who are attached to this earth are bound by palaces, but the friends of God have their thoughts fixed on the grave
subcodes.first_line_orig: نفوس خاکی در قید قصرند اما دوستان الهی در خیال قبر خداوند برای شماها قصری ابدی ساخته
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @spiritual transformation, @The Holy Spirit
